aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a decent foundation for AEO readiness with clear service offerings and contact information but lacks content depth and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and provide fresh content.
Create a blog section with informative articles about plumbing tips, maintenance, and industry news.
Implement a clear call-to-action on the homepage to encourage user engagement.

gbp_analysis.summary: The website includes a 'Why CJ Plumbing and Heating' section that touches on unique selling points, but it lacks detailed information about the business's awards, history, and expertise.
critical_issues: No detailed information about awards and recognitions.
Missing specific case studies or project highlights.
No clear differentiation from competitors in terms of services and expertise.

nap_citations.summary: The website provides a phone number and location but lacks consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the web, which are crucial for local SEO.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across the website and all online directories.
Claim and verify the Google My Business listing to improve local search visibility.
Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews on Google and other relevant platforms.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
Missing Review schema to showcase customer feedback.
No BlogPosting schema for the blog section, if implemented.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and provide fresh content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Potential customers searching for reliable plumbing services in Evanston, Illinois.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review collection strategy and showcasing them on the website.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content that establishes the business as an expert in the plumbing and heating industry.

page_title: CJ Plumbing & Heating - Award-Winning Chicago Plumbers
